## [00:00 - 01:28]

I'm going to share with you a very powerful scene with Morgan Freeman in it. And then at the end I'm going to share with you the three things that Morgan Freeman does that makes the video exceptional. The first thing that I have to say that Morgan does exceptionally well in this scene is the eye contact. Did you notice how intense the eye contact was? Did you notice how consistent it was? When you're delivering something that's really powerful and wise like in that video, you want to maintain eye contact with the person because when you maintain the eye contact you're showing them that this piece of information is critical. Number two, did you notice how Morgan paused after he said the powerful lines? Because when he paused, even though they were acting, did you notice the other person? You could see them absorbing the weight of the message. You could see them processing the message. And number three, because the eye contact was so intense and the wisdom was so intense, Morgan did something that you probably didn't notice. But he softened the message by slightly tilting his head. When you deliver a message and you keep your head posture rather straight on, it can seem a little bit intense and watch what happens if I just slightly tilt my head with a slight smile. It takes the edge off the message. Damn it, Morgan. You are bloody great at what you do.
